tasks.name: Book the cheapest Family Night visit between Dec 10–20 starting 5–7 pm for 2 adults and 2 children
tasks.description: Find Family Night tickets between December 10 and 20 that start between 5:00–7:00 pm, sort by total family price, and add the cheapest available session for 2 adults and 2 children to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "Tickets & Pricing."
On the tickets page, click the tab or filter option labeled "Family Night."
Use the date picker to restrict available sessions to dates from December 10 through December 20.
Use the time-of-day filter to show only sessions that start between 5:00 pm and 7:00 pm.
Open the sort dropdown for the sessions list and select "Total Price (Family of 4) – Low to High."
In the sorted list of sessions, click the first session card (the cheapest option).
On the session details page, set ticket quantities to "2" in the Adults field and "2" in the Children field.
Click the "Add to Cart" button for that session.

tasks.name: Create a 3-activity family itinerary on Dec 18 with Santa visit, light show, and indoor craft between 4–8 pm
tasks.description: Use the schedule to build an itinerary on December 18 that includes one Santa activity, one light show, and one indoor craft workshop, all between 4:00–8:00 pm, and add them to the user's itinerary.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "Schedule & Activities."
In the date picker, select December 18 as the visit date.
Use the filters to set Audience to "Families" and Time Range to show only activities between 4:00 pm and 8:00 pm.
In the filtered list, locate the first activity whose title includes the word "Santa," click its card, and on the details page click the "Add to My Night" or "Add to Itinerary" button.

Return to the schedule list using the back button or "Back to Schedule" link, filter the Category to show only "Light Shows," and click the activity with the earliest start time between 4:00–8:00 pm; on its details page click "Add to My Night" or "Add to Itinerary."

Change the Category filter to "Workshops & Crafts" and apply any Location filter to show "Indoors only," then click the first listed workshop and on its details page click "Add to My Night" or "Add to Itinerary."
Use the header or menu link labeled "My Night" or "My Itinerary" to open the itinerary view containing the three selected activities.

tasks.name: Find wheelchair-accessible entrance and viewing area and contact the accessibility team
tasks.description: Locate information about the main wheelchair-accessible entrance and at least one accessible viewing area, then send a message to the accessibility team using the on-site contact form about wheelchair availability at that entrance.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Accessibility" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the accessibility page, in the "Entrances" section, click the map pin or list item for the main wheelchair-accessible entrance (for example, "North Gate – Accessible").
Scroll to the "Accessible Viewing Areas" section and click the first listed accessible viewing area to open its details panel or section.
Scroll further down and click the button or link labeled "Contact Accessibility Team" or similar.
In the contact form that appears, select "Accessibility & Mobility" from the Subject or Topic dropdown menu.
Enter the name "Jordan Lee" in the Name field and "jordan.lee@example.com" in the Email field.
In the Message text box, type a question asking whether wheelchairs can be reserved at the "North Gate – Accessible" entrance.
Click the "Send Message" or "Submit" button on the accessibility contact form.

tasks.name: Select a sensory-friendly morning visit next Saturday with child ticket at or under $15 and add 1 adult and 1 child ticket to cart
tasks.description: Find a sensory-friendly morning session on the next listed Saturday, choose the first morning time slot (starting before 10:00 am) that offers a child ticket priced at $15 or less, and add 1 adult and 1 child ticket for that session to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Tickets & Pricing" option in the main navigation.
On the tickets page, apply the filter or checkbox for "Sensory-Friendly" events.
In the date picker, select the next Saturday that appears in the calendar.
In the list of sensory-friendly sessions for that Saturday, click the card for the first time slot that starts before 10:00 am and displays a child ticket price of $15 or less.
On the session details page, set the Adult ticket quantity to "1" and the Child ticket quantity to "1."
In any optional add-ons section, leave all add-on checkboxes unselected by not clicking or by deselecting any that are pre-selected.
Click the "Add to Cart" button for that session.

tasks.name: Create an evening group booking for 15 people on a Friday after 8 pm with a group discount and pay-on-arrival option
tasks.description: Use the group booking section to find a Friday time slot after 8:00 pm that offers a group discount for 15 visitors, select the cheapest such option, choose a pay-on-arrival–type payment method, and proceed to the finalization step.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Groups & Parties" link in the main navigation.
On the group bookings page, enter "15" into the group size or "Number of Guests" field.
Use the date picker to select a Friday and set the time filter to show only sessions "After 8:00 pm."
Click the button labeled "Show Group Times" or similar to display qualifying sessions.
In the list of group sessions, sort the results by "Price per Person – Low to High" and click the first option that is marked with a "Group Discount" badge or label.
On the selected group session’s booking form, choose the payment method option labeled "Pay on Arrival" or "Invoice Later" if available.
Fill in the contact information fields by entering "Taylor Morgan" as the Contact Name, "555-123-4567" as the Phone number, and "taylor.morgan@example.com" as the Email.
Click the button labeled "Continue to Finalize Booking" or "Review & Confirm" without completing any external payment.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the holiday newsletter with weekly updates about family activities and special offers
tasks.description: Open the newsletter signup form from the site, select only the 'Family Activities' and 'Special Offers & Discounts' interest categories, choose weekly frequency, fill in contact details, and submit the subscription.
steps: From the homepage, click the promotional banner or footer link labeled "Holiday Newsletter" or "Stay Updated."
On the newsletter signup page, in the Interests checklist, click to select "Family Activities."
In the same checklist, click to select "Special Offers & Discounts" and click to deselect any other categories that appear checked so that only these two remain selected.
In the Frequency dropdown or radio options, select "Weekly" as the preferred update interval.
In the Email field, type "family.visitor@example.com."
In the First Name field, type "Alex."
In the ZIP or Postal Code field, type "02134."
Click the "Sign Up" or "Subscribe" button to submit the newsletter preferences.

tasks.name: Choose between General Admission and VIP Holiday Package based on free drink perk and total price for 2 adults under $120
tasks.description: Compare the 'General Admission' and 'VIP Holiday Package' ticket types by checking their included perks and adult prices, then add 2 adult tickets of the option that includes at least one free drink and keeps the total cost for 2 adults under $120; if both or neither meet this, select the cheaper option under $120.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "Tickets & Pricing."
In the list of ticket types, click "General Admission" to open its details page.
On the General Admission details page, read the "What's Included" section to see whether any perk mentions a free drink, and note the adult ticket price shown.

Return to the tickets overview using the back button or ticket menu, then click the "VIP Holiday Package" ticket type to open its details page and read the "What's Included" section and adult ticket price in the same way.

Based on the perks and prices you just viewed, decide which ticket type satisfies these rules: prefer a ticket type that includes at least one free drink in its perks and has a total price for 2 adults under $120; if both types meet this, choose the cheaper of the two; if only one meets both conditions, choose that one; if neither meets both, choose the cheaper option whose total for 2 adults is under $120.
On the details page for the chosen ticket type, set the Adult ticket quantity field to "2."
Click the "Add to Cart" button for the chosen ticket type.

tasks.name: Find a suitable late-night bus route and send a transportation question via the site’s contact form
tasks.description: Use the 'Getting Here' section to identify a bus route whose stop is within a 10-minute walk and runs until at least 10:00 pm, then send a message via the site's contact form asking about the last departure time for that specific route.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Getting Here" or "Directions & Parking" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the directions page, click the tab or section labeled "Public Transit."
In the transport mode filters, select only the "Bus" option so that only bus routes are displayed.

From the list or map of bus routes, select a route that indicates a walking time of 10 minutes or less from its stop to the attraction and shows service running until at least 10:00 pm, then click the route name to open its details panel.
Use the header or footer to navigate to the "Contact Us" page.
In the contact form, choose "Transportation & Parking" from the Topic or Subject dropdown menu.

Enter "Riley Chen" in the Name field and "riley.chen@example.com" in the Email field, then in the Message text area type a question asking about the exact last departure time for the selected bus route, mentioning the route by name, and click the "Send" or "Submit" button.

entities.name: TicketType
entities.description: Non-date-specific ticket products like General Admission or VIP Holiday Package.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Ticket type name, e.g., 'General Admission', 'VIP Holiday Package'

fields.name: description
fields.description: Long-form description of the ticket type

fields.name: whatsIncluded
fields.description: Formatted description of what's included

fields.name: perks
fields.description: Array of perk strings, e.g., ['Free cocoa', 'Priority entry']

fields.name: includesFreeDrink
fields.description: True if at least one perk is a free drink

fields.name: adultPrice
fields.description: Price for a single adult ticket

fields.name: childPrice
fields.description: Price for a single child ticket, if applicable

fields.name: ticketCategory
fields.description: Category of ticket product

fields.name: status
fields.description: Availability status of the ticket type

fields.name: displayOrder
fields.description: Ordering index in UI lists

entities.name: Session
entities.description: Dated and timed sessions such as specific Family Night or Sensory-Friendly time slots.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name, e.g., 'Family Night – 5:30 pm'

fields.name: eventType
fields.description: Type of session used for filters like Family Night or Sensory-Friendly

fields.name: startDateTime
fields.description: Session start date and time

fields.name: endDateTime
fields.description: Session end date and time

fields.name: audience
fields.description: Primary audience if applicable

fields.name: isSensoryFriendly
fields.description: True if this is a sensory-friendly session

fields.name: isFamilyNight
fields.description: True if this is a labeled Family Night session

fields.name: baseAdultPrice
fields.description: Convenience field for default adult price for this session

fields.name: baseChildPrice
fields.description: Convenience field for default child price for this session (used for quick comparisons and filters)

fields.name: locationName
fields.description: Name of the primary location or gate for this session

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Special notes, e.g., 'Low lighting', 'Strobe effects'

fields.name: labels
fields.description: Array of display labels/badges such as ['Family Night', 'Popular']

fields.name: addOnIds
fields.description: Array of SessionAddon IDs available for this session

entities.name: SessionTicketPrice
entities.description: Per-category ticket pricing for individual sessions (adult, child, etc.).

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Associated Session.id

fields.name: category
fields.description: Ticket category type

entities.name: SessionAddon
entities.description: Optional add-ons that can be purchased with a specific session.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Associated Session.id

fields.name: name
fields.description: Add-on name, e.g., 'Photo Package'

fields.name: defaultSelected
fields.description: True if pre-checked by default in UI

entities.name: ShoppingCart
entities.description: Single shopping cart holding selected tickets and packages.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs or embedded CartItem objects

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line item in the shopping cart representing a configured session or ticket type purchase.

fields.name: cartId
fields.description: Associated ShoppingCart.id

fields.name: itemType
fields.description: Indicates whether this line is a timed session or a generic ticket type product

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Populated when itemType is 'session_ticket'

fields.name: ticketTypeId
fields.description: Populated when itemType is 'ticket_type'

fields.name: ticketSelections
fields.description: Array of objects like {category: 'adult'|'child', quantity: number, unitPrice: number}

fields.name: addOnIds
fields.description: Array of SessionAddon IDs selected for this line item

fields.name: lineTotal
fields.description: Total price for this cart line

fields.name: description
fields.description: Display summary, e.g., 'Family Night 12/18 5:30 pm – 2 Adults, 2 Children'

entities.name: Activity
entities.description: Scheduled activities such as Santa visits, light shows, and craft workshops.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Activity title; may include words like 'Santa'

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category used for filters like Light Shows or Workshops & Crafts

fields.name: audience
fields.description: Intended audience used for filters

fields.name: locationName
fields.description: Name of venue/area within the attraction

fields.name: locationType
fields.description: Indoor/outdoor flag used for filters

entities.name: Itinerary
entities.description: Personalized itinerary ('My Night') for selected activities on a given date.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date this itinerary is for (date portion used)

fields.name: itemIds
fields.description: Array of ItineraryItem IDs included in this itinerary

fields.name: name
fields.description: Optional display name, e.g., 'Family Night 12/18'

entities.name: ItineraryItem
entities.description: Link between an itinerary and an individual activity.

fields.name: itineraryId
fields.description: Associated Itinerary.id

fields.name: activityId
fields.description: Associated Activity.id

entities.name: Entrance
entities.description: Entrances to the attraction including wheelchair-accessible gates.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Entrance name, e.g., 'North Gate – Accessible'

fields.name: mapCoordinates
fields.description: Coordinates or map reference string for pin placement

fields.name: directions
fields.description: Text directions to reach this entrance

entities.name: AccessibleViewingArea
entities.description: Accessible viewing areas within the attraction.

fields.name: nearestEntranceId
fields.description: Entrance.id of the nearest or associated entrance

fields.name: seatingType
fields.description: Type of viewing arrangement

fields.name: mapCoordinates
fields.description: Coordinates or map reference string

entities.name: GroupSessionOption
entities.description: Group-bookable time slots with group pricing and available payment methods.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Underlying Session.id if this group option maps to a standard session

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name for the group slot

fields.name: hasGroupDiscount
fields.description: Whether a discount is applied

fields.name: badges
fields.description: Array of badge labels, e.g., ['Group Discount']

fields.name: paymentMethodsAvailable
fields.description: Array of payment method enums allowed for this group option

entities.name: GroupBooking
entities.description: Bookings for group sessions including contact info and chosen payment method.

fields.name: groupSessionOptionId
fields.description: Associated GroupSessionOption.id

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.description: Selected payment option for the group booking

fields.name: status
fields.description: Booking progression state

fields.name: interests
fields.description: Array of interest enums selected for this subscription

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: How often the subscriber wants updates

fields.name: status
fields.description: Subscription status

entities.name: TransitRoute
entities.description: Public transit routes serving the attraction, including bus routes.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Route name or number, e.g., 'Bus 42'

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Transport mode used in filters

fields.name: walkingTimeMinutes
fields.description: Estimated walking time from stop/station to the attraction

fields.name: serviceStartTime
fields.description: Typical first departure time as 'HH:MM', if needed

fields.name: serviceEndTime
fields.description: Typical last departure time as 'HH:MM' used to check running until at least 22:00

fields.name: daysOfWeek
fields.description: Array of day-of-week enums for which this service runs

entities.name: ContactMessage
entities.description: Messages submitted via general and accessibility-specific contact forms.

fields.name: topic
fields.description: Selected subject/topic from dropdown

fields.name: source
fields.description: Which form/page was used to submit this message

fields.name: relatedContext
fields.description: Free-text reference to related entity, e.g., 'North Gate – Accessible' or 'Bus Route 42'
